regimes.label: GFC crash
regimes.description: Global Financial Crisis drawdown from the 2007 peak to the March 2009 low.

regimes.label: QE recovery
regimes.description: Post-GFC recovery driven by emergency policy and early QE.

regimes.label: Euro crisis / downgrade chop
regimes.description: US downgrade, euro-sovereign stress, and high-volatility range behavior.

regimes.label: Secular tech bull
regimes.description: Long low-rate expansion before the 2018 tightening drawdown.

regimes.label: Tightening / trade-war drawdown
regimes.description: Q4 2018 selloff under tightening fears and trade-war pressure.

regimes.label: Pre-COVID melt-up
regimes.description: Late-cycle rally after the 2018 reset and before the pandemic shock.

regimes.label: COVID crash
regimes.description: Pandemic panic drawdown into the March 2020 low.

regimes.label: Stimulus / reopening bull
regimes.description: Liquidity-driven rebound and reopening bull market.

regimes.label: Inflation / hiking bear
regimes.description: Inflation shock and aggressive rate hikes driving a deep tech drawdown.

regimes.label: AI / disinflation bull
regimes.description: AI-led rebound with easing inflation expectations.

regimes.label: Late-cycle policy volatility
regimes.description: Recent market shaped more by policy shocks and macro-volatility than a clean trend.
